duplicate_system_clusters.summary: PlanRow authority is mutated through multiple product surfaces instead of one locked writer.
Multiple append helpers write governed JSONL/NDJSON stores without a shared authority abstraction.
Review-channel state and projections have multiple derivation/write paths that must converge on one governed reducer spine.
